name: Slurm time-limit fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe accounting and log snippets to check time-limit triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic sacct output for a job cancelled at its time limit.
Synthetic log showing Slurm time-limit cancellation and checkpoint progress.

checks.label: Log fixture contains cancellation and checkpoint evidence

expected_outcomes: The skill should distinguish normal progress at time limit from immediate application failure.
The skill should suggest checkpointing, splitting, or requesting more time only after reviewing progress evidence.
